qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_adelanto as oi_adelanto, t0.f_adelanto as f_adelanto, t0.n_monto_adel as n_monto_adel, t0.n_criticidad as n_criticidad, t0.d_destino as d_destino, t0.d_orden_cheque as d_orden_cheque, t0.n_monto_a_rendir as n_monto_a_rendir, t0.f_pago as f_pago, t0.e_solicitud as e_solicitud, t0.f_necesidad_fondos as f_necesidad_fondos, SEC.policy, t0.oi_adelanto as CODE, t0.oi_adelanto as TEXT, t0.oi_carpeta as oi_carpeta, t0.oi_clasif_sujeto as oi_clasif_sujeto, t0.oi_estado_ant as oi_estado_ant, t0.oi_tipo_adelanto as oi_tipo_adelanto, t0.oi_ubicacion as oi_ubicacion, t0.oi_sujeto as oi_sujeto, t0.oi_tarea as oi_tarea FROM LEG04_ADELANTOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_adelanto LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_adelanto asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_adelanto as oi_adelanto, SEC.policy FROM LEG04_ADELANTOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_adelanto LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_adelanto asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto) as CNT from LEG04_ADELANTOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto as ID, LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto as COD, LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto as DES, LEG04_ADELANTOS.f_adelanto, LEG04_ADELANTOS.n_monto_adel, LEG01_CARPETAS.d_carpeta as DCARPETA, LEG01_CARPETAS.c_carpeta as CCARPETA, LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta from LEG04_ADELANTOS, LEG01_CARPETAS join LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_carpeta INNER LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto) as CNT from LEG04_ADELANTOS, LEG01_CARPETAS JOIN LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_carpeta INNER LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto as ID, LEG01_CARPETAS.c_carpeta as COD, LEG01_CARPETAS.d_carpeta as DES FROM LEG04_ADELANTOS, LEG01_CARPETAS JOIN LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_carpeta LEFT OUTER LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta WHERE LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto as ID, LEG04_ADELANTOS.f_adelanto as COD, LEG04_ADELANTOS.n_monto_adel as DES, LEG04_ADELANTOS.n_monto_a_rendir as DES2, LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_carpeta as PARENT from LEG04_ADELANTOS, LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT
join LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_estado_ant inner LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT.oi_estado_ant
Where 1=1 AND LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT.d_estado_ant != \'Rendido\' {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}
ORDER BY COD asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto) as CNT from LEG04_ADELANTOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Igual que INFO_PORCARPETA pero trae tambien los adelantos rendidos, se usa en el reporte
resource.name: INFO_PORCARPETA_COMPLETO

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto) as CNT from LEG04_ADELANTOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto as ID, LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto as COD, LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto as DES FROM LEG04_ADELANTOS WHERE LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto as ID, LEG04_ADELANTOS.f_adelanto as COD, LEG04_ADELANTOS.n_monto_adel as DES, LEG04_ADELANTOS.n_monto_a_rendir as DES2, LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_carpeta as PARENT from LEG04_ADELANTOS, LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT
join LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_estado_ant inner LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT.oi_estado_ant
Where 1=1 AND LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT.d_estado_ant != \'Rendido\' {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and ( contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(DES2,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ID,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}
ORDER BY COD asc ')/ROWS/ROW

method.label: Guarda en disco la imagen para el reporte Anticipos
method.name: SAVE_LOGO

method.label: Setea la ruta de la imagen de la empresa del adelanto
method.name: SET_RUTA

method.label: Crea el XML para el reporte de anticipo de fondos
method.name: GENERATE_XML_REPORT

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.QUERY

resource.declare: <PARAM OI_PARENT="2401" TXT_FIND="" WHERE="" START="0" LEN="13" ORDERBY="COD"/>
resource.name: ASOCIABLES

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.QUERY
QRY_CANT_MODO_PAGO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT COUNT(LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_modo_de_pago) as CANT FROM LEG04_MODO_PAGO WHERE LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_adelanto={#SOURCE:@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_CANT_MODO_PAGO_TRANSF
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT COUNT(LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_modo_de_pago) as CANT FROM LEG04_MODO_PAGO WHERE LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_adelanto={#SOURCE:@ID} AND ISNOTNULL(LEG04_MODO_PAGO.f_transferido) ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <PARAM OI_PARENT="706" TXT_FIND="" WHERE="" START="0" LEN="13" ORDERBY="COD" />
resource.name: INFO_PORCARPETA_SINANULADOS

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.ADELANTO.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto as ID, LEG04_ADELANTOS.f_adelanto as COD, LEG04_ADELANTOS.n_monto_adel as DES, LEG04_ADELANTOS.n_monto_a_rendir as DES2, LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_carpeta as PARENT, LEG04_ADELANTOS.f_anula from LEG04_ADELANTOS, LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT
join LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_estado_ant inner LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT.oi_estado_ant
Where 1=1 AND LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT.d_estado_ant != \'Rendido\' AND ISNULL(LEG04_ADELANTOS.f_anula) {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and ( contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(DES2,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ID,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}
ORDER BY COD asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.MODO_DE_PAGO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.MODO_DE_PAGO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_modo_de_pago) as CNT from LEG04_MODO_PAGO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_modo_de_pago={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_modo_de_pago,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG04_MODO_PAGO.c_modo_de_pago,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_adelanto={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.DETALLE.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.DETALLE.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG04_DETALLE.oi_detalle) as CNT from LEG04_DETALLE Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG04_DETALLE.oi_detalle={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG04_DETALLE.oi_detalle,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG04_DETALLE.oi_detalle,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and LEG04_DETALLE.oi_modo_de_pago={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.DETALLE.QUERY1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select LEG53_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto as ID, LEG53_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto as COD, LEG53_CONCEPTOS.d_concepto as DES, SUM(LEG04_DETALLE.n_importe) as IMP, LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_adelanto as PARENT from LEG53_CONCEPTOS, LEG04_MODO_PAGO, LEG04_DETALLE
JOIN LEG53_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto INNER LEG04_DETALLE.oi_concepto, LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_modo_de_pago INNER LEG04_DETALLE.oi_modo_de_pago
Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} GROUP BY LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_adelanto,LEG53_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto,LEG53_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto,LEG53_CONCEPTOS.d_concepto {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by ID asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Adelantos.DETALLE.QUERY
GetConceptos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT LEG04_DETALLE.oi_concepto, SUM(LEG04_DETALLE.n_importe) as n_total
FROM LEG04_MODO_PAGO, LEG04_DETALLE
JOIN LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_modo_de_pago INNER LEG04_DETALLE.oi_modo_de_pago
WHERE LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_adelanto = {$PARAM/@oi_adelanto}
GROUP BY LEG04_DETALLE.oi_concepto
')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GetRendicion
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT REN.oi_rendicion
FROM LEG06_RENDICIONES as REN
WHERE REN.l_anulado = 0 AND REN.oi_adelanto = {$PARAM/@oi_adelanto}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GetComprobante
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT COMP.oi_comp_rendicion, COMP.n_subtotal, COMP.n_iva, COMP.n_otros_impuestos, TC.c_tipo
FROM LEG06_COMPS_RENDICION as COMP, LEG63_TIPOS_COMPROB as TC
JOIN COMP.oi_tipo_comprob INNER TC.oi_tipo_comprob
WHERE COMP.oi_rendicion = {$PARAM/@oi_rendicion}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GetConcepto
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT SUM(CONC.n_total) as total_conc
FROM LEG06_CONCEPTOS_COMP as CONC
WHERE CONC.oi_comp_rendicion = {$PARAM/@oi_comp_rendicion} AND CONC.oi_concepto = {$FILTER/@oi_concepto}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryRendido
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT SUM(CC.n_total) as rendido
FROM LEG06_RENDICIONES as R, LEG06_COMPS_RENDICION as CR, LEG06_CONCEPTOS_COMP as CC
JOIN R.oi_rendicion INNER CR.oi_rendicion, CR.oi_comp_rendicion INNER CC.oi_comp_rendicion
WHERE R.l_anulado = 0 AND R.oi_adelanto = {$PARAM/@oi_adelanto} AND CC.oi_concepto = {$PARAM/@oi_concepto}
')/ROWS/ROW
